_comment: Curated optional face-detection models. The built-in YuNet needs no model file and remains the zero-setup default; these trade a download for higher recall on small/hard faces. sha256 values are PINNED: every download must hash-match or is rejected and deleted (same TOFU rules as plate_models.json).

models.label: CenterFace (7 MB — better small/medium-face recall)
models.notes: WIDER FACE ~0.93/0.92/0.78 (easy/medium/hard) vs YuNet ~0.89/0.87/0.77. Runs at frame resolution, so it finds smaller faces than fixed-input detectors. Clean MIT license.

models.label: SCRFD-10G (17 MB — highest accuracy; NON-COMMERCIAL license)
models.attribution: Model: deepinsight/insightface SCRFD det_10g (pretrained weights are for non-commercial research use — check the InsightFace terms before using this model in a commercial setting).
models.notes: WIDER FACE ~0.95/0.94/0.83 — the strongest option, especially on profiles and occlusion. InsightFace pretrained weights are licensed for non-commercial research use only; OpenScrub does not bundle them.
